h1.visual_description: Not present on this page, but inferred as chapter titles based on running header style.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; likely bold serif or small caps centered.

visual_matchers.pattern: FIGURE [NUMBER] followed by bolded caption text and metadata in small caps.
Small numeric superscript in body text corresponding to a numbered list at the bottom of the column.
Horizontal rule (hairline) separating body text from bottom-aligned content.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Chicago-style footnotes (Author, Title, Page) with corresponding superscript numbers in text.

margin_noise_patterns.header_left: Uppercase chapter/section title (e.g., 'CIRCULATING THINGS, CIRCULATING STEREOTYPES')
